nav.tagline: School transit, all in one place

home.title: Today's Air Quality Report
home.intro: Track the weather, PM2.5 and humidity in one place, with quick access for drivers and the admin back office.
home.advice1: Wear a mask outdoors, especially in the morning.
home.advice2: Avoid strenuous exercise when PM2.5 exceeds 35 µg/m³.
home.advice3: Check the AQI before travelling and pick a cleaner route.

about.title: School Transport Plus
about.subtitle: Elevating School Transit, All in One Place
about.lead: School Transport Plus is a data-driven IoT transportation management platform designed to improve school commuting through RFID identification, GPS tracking, real-time notifications, and centralized administration.
about.introBody: School transportation plays a critical role in helping parents send students to school safely while reducing traffic congestion around campuses. School Transport Plus was developed to transform traditional school transportation into a smart, measurable, and efficient ecosystem.
about.introGoal: Our goal is to create a one-stop-service transportation platform that builds trust between schools, parents, and transportation providers.
about.problemIntro: Large urban schools face several transportation challenges:
problemList: Communication delays between schools and parents
Excess fuel consumption and carbon emissions
caseStudyList: High vehicle density during peak hours
Significant traffic bottlenecks during drop-off and pick-up periods
objectivesList: Collect transportation data for decision making.
Measure environmental impact through data analytics.

features.name: RFID Student Identification
features.desc: Students tap their RFID cards when boarding the vehicle for accurate attendance recording, instant status updates, and reduced human error.

features.name: GPS Vehicle Tracking
features.desc: Real-time location tracking enables parent monitoring, vehicle route visibility, and accurate arrival estimation.

features.name: LINE Notifications
features.desc: Automatic notifications are sent when a student boards the vehicle, arrives at school, leaves school, and arrives home.

features.name: Management Dashboard
features.desc: Administrators monitor vehicle locations, student status, travel logs, driver activity, and historical transportation data.

features.name: Data Analytics
features.desc: The system collects boarding records, travel distance, vehicle utilization, and peak-hour trends to support future planning.

about.impactModel: Environmental impact model: ΔCO₂ = ΔVehicles × Distance × Emission Factor (0.192 kg CO₂ / km). Reference: IPCC Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories (2006).
about.conclusionBody: School Transport Plus demonstrates that a data-driven IoT transportation framework can significantly improve school transportation management through RFID identification, GPS tracking, cloud-based analytics, and automated notifications.
about.motto: "Transforming School Commuting into a Measurable Environmental System"
